text:
I downloaded FreeBSD 6.1 i386 and got problem installing because I was stuck when the system is trying to detect my SATA hard drive.  Below is the specs of my computer:
 
AMD Athlon64 3200+
2x Geil DDR2 800mhz
MSI K9N Neo-F Motherboard
2x 160 GB Western Digital Caviar
